Proposed pillar: P1 Quy mô & hiệu quả thị trường
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo quy mô, tốc độ tăng trưởng và cấu trúc giá trị của thị trường TMĐT Việt Nam.
Primary VDEI pillar name: E-commerce Business Performance / Hiệu quả TMĐT phía doanh nghiệp
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo quy mô thị trường, doanh thu, giao dịch, kênh bán hàng, thanh toán, logistics và hiệu quả vận hành của doanh nghiệp/nền tảng TMĐT.
Indicator meaning: Tổng giá trị giao dịch TMĐT của Việt Nam, dùng như KPI quy mô thị trường cốt lõi ở cấp quốc gia.
Formula / operationalization: GMV_t = tổng giá trị giao dịch hàng hóa/dịch vụ TMĐT trong kỳ.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: Google-Temasek-Bain e-Conomy SEA 2024/2025; Exact: e-Conomy SEA 2024, Vietnam p.4 (E-commerce GMV 2022-2024); e-Conomy SEA 2025, Vietnam p.3 (E-commerce GMV 2023-2025)
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "e-Conomy SEA {year} Vietnam report Google Temasek Bain" or go directly to https://economysea.withgoogle.com/.
 2) Click "Download reports" and select Vietnam country report or the full SEA report for the target year.
 3) Download the PDF and store it with metadata fields: report_year, country, source_url, downloaded_at.
 4) Use PDF text extraction first; if the page is a chart, use OCR/table extraction on the Vietnam country pages.
 5) For this indicator, search within the PDF using keywords from the indicator name plus: "e-commerce", "GMV", "digital economy", "video commerce", "DFS", "gross transaction value".
 6) Extract value, unit, year/forecast year, page number, chart title, and footnote. Flag values as "actual/estimate/forecast" because e-Conomy SEA often reports estimated current-year values.
 7) Manual QA: compare with Google Vietnam/Bain press release for the same report year before publishing to dashboard.
 
 - Source: Google-Temasek-Bain e-Conomy SEA 2024/2025; Exact: e-Conomy SEA 2024, Vietnam p.4 (E-commerce GMV 2022-2024); e-Conomy SEA 2025, Vietnam p.3 (E-commerce GMV 2023-2025)
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://economysea.withgoogle.com/; https://services.google.com/fh/files/misc/vietnam_e_conomy_sea_2025_report.pdf
 - Row-specific search keywords: GMV e-commerce, A01, Billion USD
Collection method: Report extraction and computed ratio; manual QA for annual version.
Update suitability: High for research index; medium for near-real-time dashboard
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: 2024: e-Conomy SEA 2024 reported Vietnam e-commerce market around USD 22B; 2025: Google Vietnam blog/e-Conomy SEA 2025 says e-commerce is forecast to reach USD 25B.

Source: e-Conomy SEA / VECOM; Exact: e-Conomy SEA 2024, Vietnam p.4 cho thấy e-commerce tăng 25% năm 2024; e-Conomy SEA 2025, Vietnam p.3 cho thấy 2024-2025 tăng 17%

Proposed pillar: P2. Cầu & hành vi người tiêu dùng/doanh nghiệp mua
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo mức độ tham gia, tần suất, chi tiêu và sự quay lại của người mua online.
Primary VDEI pillar name: E-commerce Consumer Behavior / Hành vi và trải nghiệm người tiêu dùng TMĐT
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo mức độ tham gia, hành vi mua sắm, trải nghiệm, niềm tin và xu hướng tiêu dùng của người mua online.
Indicator meaning: Tỷ lệ người dùng Internet đã mua online trong kỳ tham chiếu.
Formula / operationalization: % internet users buying online_t = Online buyers_t / Internet users_t * 100.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: Consumer survey / e-Conomy SEA / DataReportal; Exact: e-Conomy SEA 2022 Vietnam consumer page shows e-commerce adoption among urban digital users
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "DataReportal Digital {year} Vietnam" or open https://datareportal.com/digital-in-vietnam.
 2) Select the report matching the target year, e.g. Digital 2023: Vietnam, Digital 2024: Vietnam, Digital 2025: Vietnam.
 3) Crawl the HTML article first because headline statistics are available in text; optionally download/parse the embedded slide deck if needed.
 4) Search within page for: "internet users", "internet penetration", "social media users", "mobile connections", "ecommerce".
 5) Extract value, unit, date basis (normally January/start of year), source note (Kepios/GSMA/Meta/etc.), and URL.
 6) Standardize date as YYYY-01 and mark as start-of-year observation.
 7) Manual QA: DataReportal can revise methodology, so keep the exact report URL/year and do not mix values across global and country reports.
 
Source: Consumer survey / e-Conomy SEA / DataReportal; Exact: e-Conomy SEA 2022 Vietnam consumer page shows e-commerce adoption among urban digital users
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-vietnam; https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/VNM/indicator/IT.NET.USER.ZS?format=json; https://datahub.itu.int/data/?e=VNM; https://vnnic.vn/en/insights
 - Row-specific search keywords: % internet users buying online, B02, %
Collection method: API/HTML/PDF extraction; scheduled monthly/annual refresh depending source.
Update suitability: High for research index; medium for near-real-time dashboard

Proposed pillar: P2. Cầu & hành vi người tiêu dùng/doanh nghiệp mua
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo mức độ tham gia, tần suất, chi tiêu và sự quay lại của người mua online.
Primary VDEI pillar name: E-commerce Business Performance / Hiệu quả TMĐT phía doanh nghiệp
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo quy mô thị trường, doanh thu, giao dịch, kênh bán hàng, thanh toán, logistics và hiệu quả vận hành của doanh nghiệp/nền tảng TMĐT.
Indicator meaning: Tỷ lệ doanh nghiệp nhận đơn hàng qua công cụ trực tuyến.
Formula / operationalization: % enterprises receiving orders online = enterprises receiving online orders / surveyed enterprises * 100.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: EBI / enterprise survey; Exact: EBI 2024 B2B methodology p.46-47 includes 'nhận đơn đặt hàng qua các công cụ trực tuyến'; EBI 2023 B2B methodology p.53-54
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "Báo cáo Chỉ số Thương mại điện tử Việt Nam EBI {year} VECOM PDF" or open https://vecom.vn/ and https://en.vecom.vn/.
 2) Open the EBI article for the target year and download the Vietnamese/English PDF; also keep the PDF URL if hosted on esc.vn or vecom.vn.
 3) Use the report table of contents to locate sections on infrastructure, B2C, B2B, G2B, cross-border e-commerce, payment, logistics, website, social commerce, marketplace, e-contract/e-signature.
 4) In the PDF, search keywords from the indicator name and Vietnamese equivalents: "website", "sàn thương mại điện tử", "mạng xã hội", "hợp đồng điện tử", "chữ ký điện tử", "thanh toán", "logistics", "xuất nhập khẩu", "bán hàng".
 5) Extract chart/figure number, page number, respondent base if shown, percentage/value, year, and notes.
 6) If the value is by province, preserve province_code/province_name and aggregate only if the report explicitly gives national average.
 7) Manual QA: EBI is annual and methodology can change; keep a "method_version" field for each year.
 
Source: EBI / enterprise survey; Exact: EBI 2024 B2B methodology p.46-47 includes 'nhận đơn đặt hàng qua các công cụ trực tuyến'; EBI 2023 B2B methodology p.53-54
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://vecom.vn/bao-cao-chi-so-thuong-mai-dien-tu-viet-nam-2025; https://esc.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Bao-cao-EBI-2025-Final-Vn.pdf
 - Row-specific search keywords: % enterprises receiving orders online, B09, %
Collection method: Report extraction and computed ratio; manual QA for annual version.
Update suitability: High for research index; medium for near-real-time dashboard

Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "e-Conomy SEA {year} Vietnam report Google Temasek Bain" or go directly to https://economysea.withgoogle.com/.

 3) Download the PDF and store it with metadata fields: report_year, country, source_url, downloaded_at.
 4) Use PDF text extraction first; if the page is a chart, use OCR/table extraction on the Vietnam country pages.
 5) For this indicator, search within the PDF using keywords from the indicator name plus: "e-commerce", "GMV", "digital economy", "video commerce", "DFS", "gross transaction value".
 6) Extract value, unit, year/forecast year, page number, chart title, and footnote. Flag values as "actual/estimate/forecast" because e-Conomy SEA often reports estimated current-year values.
 7) Manual QA: compare with Google Vietnam/Bain press release for the same report year before publishing to dashboard.

Proposed pillar: P8. TMĐT xuyên biên giới & môi trường hỗ trợ
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo quy mô nhập/xuất khẩu B2C online, mức tham gia quốc tế của doanh nghiệp, sử dụng nền tảng quốc tế và nhu cầu hỗ trợ.
Primary VDEI pillar name: E-commerce Business Performance / Hiệu quả TMĐT phía doanh nghiệp
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo quy mô thị trường, doanh thu, giao dịch, kênh bán hàng, thanh toán, logistics và hiệu quả vận hành của doanh nghiệp/nền tảng TMĐT.
Indicator meaning: Nhập khẩu trực tuyến B2C của người tiêu dùng Việt Nam.
Formula / operationalization: B2C cross-border import GMV = estimated online consumer imports in period t.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: EBI 2025 cross-border study; Exact: EBI 2025 cross-border methodology/results p.71: online import B2C 2024 = 2.4 tỷ USD
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "Báo cáo Chỉ số Thương mại điện tử Việt Nam EBI {year} VECOM PDF" or open https://vecom.vn/ and https://en.vecom.vn/.
 2) Open the EBI article for the target year and download the Vietnamese/English PDF; also keep the PDF URL if hosted on esc.vn or vecom.vn.
 3) Use the report table of contents to locate sections on infrastructure, B2C, B2B, G2B, cross-border e-commerce, payment, logistics, website, social commerce, marketplace, e-contract/e-signature.
 4) In the PDF, search keywords from the indicator name and Vietnamese equivalents: "website", "sàn thương mại điện tử", "mạng xã hội", "hợp đồng điện tử", "chữ ký điện tử", "thanh toán", "logistics", "xuất nhập khẩu", "bán hàng".
 5) Extract chart/figure number, page number, respondent base if shown, percentage/value, year, and notes.
 6) If the value is by province, preserve province_code/province_name and aggregate only if the report explicitly gives national average.
 7) Manual QA: EBI is annual and methodology can change; keep a "method_version" field for each year.
 
 - Source: EBI 2025 cross-border study; Exact: EBI 2025 cross-border methodology/results p.71: online import B2C 2024 = 2.4 tỷ USD
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://accesspartnership.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/E-Commerce-Export-A-New-Growth-Driver_VN.pdf; https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/28/AS/AGS/images/website/VNSellDot/seller-report-2025/Amazon_Vietnam_SMEs_Empowerment_Report_2025_ENG_org.pdf; https://idea.gov.vn/?page=document
 - Row-specific search keywords: B2C cross-border import GMV, H01, Billion USD
Collection method: Annual report/PDF extraction plus survey/partner data.
Update suitability: High for research index; medium for near-real-time dashboard

Proposed pillar: P1. Quy mô & hiệu quả thị trường
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo quy mô, tốc độ tăng trưởng và cấu trúc giá trị của thị trường TMĐT Việt Nam.
Primary VDEI pillar name: E-commerce Business Performance / Hiệu quả TMĐT phía doanh nghiệp
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo quy mô thị trường, doanh thu, giao dịch, kênh bán hàng, thanh toán, logistics và hiệu quả vận hành của doanh nghiệp/nền tảng TMĐT.
Indicator meaning: Tổng số đơn hàng TMĐT phát sinh trong kỳ.
Formula / operationalization: Order volume_t = count(successful e-commerce orders in period t).
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: Marketplace / OMS / seller ERP / logistics partner data; Exact: N/A public standard source; requires partner feed or internal order-event warehouse
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "e-Conomy SEA {year} Vietnam report Google Temasek Bain" or go directly to https://economysea.withgoogle.com/.
 2) Click "Download reports" and select Vietnam country report or the full SEA report for the target year.
 3) Download the PDF and store it with metadata fields: report_year, country, source_url, downloaded_at.
 4) Use PDF text extraction first; if the page is a chart, use OCR/table extraction on the Vietnam country pages.
 5) For this indicator, search within the PDF using keywords from the indicator name plus: "e-commerce", "GMV", "digital economy", "video commerce", "DFS", "gross transaction value".
 6) Extract value, unit, year/forecast year, page number, chart title, and footnote. Flag values as "actual/estimate/forecast" because e-Conomy SEA often reports estimated current-year values.
 7) Manual QA: compare with Google Vietnam/Bain press release for the same report year before publishing to dashboard.
 
 - Source: Marketplace / OMS / seller ERP / logistics partner data; Exact: N/A public standard source; requires partner feed or internal order-event warehouse
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://economysea.withgoogle.com/; https://services.google.com/fh/files/misc/vietnam_e_conomy_sea_2025_report.pdf; https://ecommerce.metric.vn/vietnam-ecommerce-report-2025; https://www.younetgroup.com/younet-vietnam-e-commerce-intelligence-2025-report-from-consumer-behavior-to-breakthrough-growth-on-e-commerce/; https://www.similarweb.com/; https://www.sensortower.com/
 - Row-specific search keywords: E-commerce order volume, A05, Count
Collection method: Partner/API/licensed feed preferred; fallback report extraction where public.
Update suitability: High for web dashboard if data-sharing/API secured
Tier / decision: Tier 2 - Core but partner/paid feed needed

Proposed pillar: P2 Cầu & hành vi người tiêu dùng/doanh nghiệp mua
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo mức độ tham gia, tần suất, chi tiêu và sự quay lại của người mua online.
Primary VDEI pillar name: E-commerce Consumer Behavior / Hành vi và trải nghiệm người tiêu dùng TMĐT
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo mức độ tham gia, hành vi mua sắm, trải nghiệm, niềm tin và xu hướng tiêu dùng của người mua online.
Indicator meaning: Số người tiêu dùng mua hàng trực tuyến trong kỳ.
Formula / operationalization: Online buyers_t = count(unique buyers with ≥1 online purchase in period t).
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: Consumer survey / platform ID graph / e-Conomy SEA; external consumer survey/partner identity graph required for population estimate
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Open Similarweb category ranking: https://www.similarweb.com/top-websites/vietnam/e-commerce-and-shopping/ or search "Similarweb top websites Vietnam e-commerce".
 2) If public page is accessible, crawl rank, domain, category, visits/traffic fields shown. If blocked/paywalled, use Similarweb API/export under a licensed account.
 3) For marketplace/app indicators, build a list of target domains/apps: shopee.vn, lazada.vn, tiki.vn, tiktok.com/shop related traffic, sendo.vn, etc.
 4) Extract rank, visits, visit share, month, device split if available, source URL and crawl timestamp.
 5) Compute shares only from comparable domains and document the denominator.
 6) Manual QA: Similarweb estimates are third-party; label as market-intelligence proxy, not official statistics.
 
 - Source: Consumer survey / platform ID graph / e-Conomy SEA; external consumer survey/partner identity graph required for population estimate
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://ecommerce.metric.vn/vietnam-ecommerce-report-2025; https://www.younetgroup.com/younet-vietnam-e-commerce-intelligence-2025-report-from-consumer-behavior-to-breakthrough-growth-on-e-commerce/; https://www.similarweb.com/; https://www.sensortower.com/
 - Row-specific search keywords: Number of B2C online buyers, B01, People
Collection method: Partner/API/licensed feed preferred; fallback report extraction where public.
Update suitability: High for web dashboard if data-sharing/API secured
Tier / decision: Tier 2 - Core but partner/paid feed needed
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: Blank intentionally: DataReportal internet users is not the same as number of B2C online buyers.

1) Search official payment sources: State Bank of Vietnam (NHNN/SBV), NAPAS annual reports, or e-Conomy SEA DFS pages.

 5) Do not mix "transaction value" with "acceptance rate"; acceptance usually needs merchant/platform data.
 6) Manual QA: payment data definitions differ strongly across sources.

Indicator meaning: Lượt truy cập web của các sàn và website TMĐT lớn tại Việt Nam.
Formula / operationalization: Top e-commerce website traffic = visits/sessions to each platform domain per month.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Source: Similarweb; Exact: https://www.similarweb.com/top-websites/vietnam/e-commerce-and-shopping/
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Open Similarweb category ranking: https://www.similarweb.com/top-websites/vietnam/e-commerce-and-shopping/ or search "Similarweb top websites Vietnam e-commerce".
 2) If public page is accessible, crawl rank, domain, category, visits/traffic fields shown. If blocked/paywalled, use Similarweb API/export under a licensed account.
 3) For marketplace/app indicators, build a list of target domains/apps: shopee.vn, lazada.vn, tiki.vn, tiktok.com/shop related traffic, sendo.vn, etc.
 4) Extract rank, visits, visit share, month, device split if available, source URL and crawl timestamp.
 5) Compute shares only from comparable domains and document the denominator.
 6) Manual QA: Similarweb estimates are third-party; label as market-intelligence proxy, not official statistics.

 4) Extract rank, visits, visit share, month, device split if available, source URL and crawl timestamp.
 5) Compute shares only from comparable domains and document the denominator.
 6) Manual QA: Similarweb estimates are third-party; label as market-intelligence proxy, not official statistics.

 - Row-specific search keywords: Category concentration / top seller share, G08, %

Proposed pillar: P6 Hạ tầng số & niềm tin
Proposed pillar meaning: Đo điều kiện nền tảng như internet, broadband, 4G/5G, tốc độ mạng, an toàn dữ liệu và tuân thủ bảo mật.
Primary VDEI pillar name: The policy and institutional environment / Môi trường chính sách và thể chế
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo khung pháp lý, chính sách hỗ trợ, mức độ thuận lợi cho kinh doanh số, giao dịch điện tử, thương mại xuyên biên giới và bảo vệ dữ liệu.
Indicator meaning: Tỷ lệ doanh nghiệp có chính sách bảo mật thông tin chính thức.
Formula / operationalization: Cybersecurity policy adoption = enterprises with cybersecurity policy / surveyed enterprises * 100.
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Search keyword: "DataReportal Digital {year} Vietnam" or open https://datareportal.com/digital-in-vietnam.
 2) Select the report matching the target year, e.g. Digital 2023: Vietnam, Digital 2024: Vietnam, Digital 2025: Vietnam.
 3) Crawl the HTML article first because headline statistics are available in text; optionally download/parse the embedded slide deck if needed.
 4) Search within page for: "internet users", "internet penetration", "social media users", "mobile connections", "ecommerce".
 5) Extract value, unit, date basis (normally January/start of year), source note (Kepios/GSMA/Meta/etc.), and URL.
 6) Standardize date as YYYY-01 and mark as start-of-year observation.
 7) Manual QA: DataReportal can revise methodology, so keep the exact report URL/year and do not mix values across global and country reports.
 
 - Recommended starting URL(s): https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-vietnam; https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/VNM/indicator/IT.NET.USER.ZS?format=json; https://datahub.itu.int/data/?e=VNM; https://vnnic.vn/en/insights
 - Row-specific search keywords: Cybersecurity policy adoption, F07, %
Collection method: API/HTML/PDF extraction; scheduled monthly/annual refresh depending source.
Update suitability: Useful for context; not essential for first release

Indicator: Formal firms in wholesale and retail
Indicator meaning: Số doanh nghiệp đang hoạt động có KQ SXKD trong ngành bán buôn, bán lẻ.
Formula / operationalization: Formal firms in wholesale/retail = count of active registered firms in wholesale and retail.

Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Open GSO: https://www.gso.gov.vn/ or search "Sách trắng doanh nghiệp {year} Tổng cục Thống kê PDF".

 3) Locate the table named in the source detail, commonly Table 5 for number of enterprises or Table 29 for revenue by industry.
 4) Extract rows by VSIC industry: wholesale/retail, transport/storage, information/communication.
 5) Store values with table number, page, unit, year, industry code/name.
 6) Manual QA: these are ecosystem proxy indicators, not direct e-commerce indicators; label accordingly.

Primary VDEI pillar name: Digital Capability / Năng lực số của doanh nghiệp và người lao động
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo năng lực tổ chức, kỹ năng số, mức độ sẵn sàng triển khai kênh bán hàng số và vận hành TMĐT của doanh nghiệp.
Indicator meaning:
Đo nền tảng kỹ năng số cơ bản của lực lượng lao động/người dùng có khả năng tham gia và vận hành hoạt động số, 

bao gồm tìm kiếm, đánh giá thông tin, xử lý tài liệu số, sử dụng bảng tính/công cụ trực tuyến. 
Đây là proxy cấp quốc gia cho năng lực nhân sự số phục vụ TMĐT.
Unit: % of individuals/labour force; or composite score from selected ITU ICT-skills activities
Formula / operationalization: Recommended formula: average of selected ITU activity-level ICT-skill percentages for Viet Nam, e.g. information/data literacy + basic digital content creation activities. Alternative if the team wants a single raw value: use one chosen ITU activity such as 'using basic arithmetic formula in a spreadsheet'.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Primary source: ITU DataHub, Viet Nam, Individuals with ICT skills indicators. Secondary source: ITU Facts and Figures methodology for grouping ICT skill activities. No Questionnaire source used.
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Start from ITU DataHub: https://datahub.itu.int/data/?e=VNM.
 2) In the DataHub search/filter, select economy = Viet Nam and search the indicator group 'Individuals with ICT skills'.
 3) Prioritize activity groups that map to basic digital skills: 'Information and data literacy', 'Digital content creation', 'Communication and collaboration', and 'Problem solving'.
 4) Suggested crawl/search keywords: 'Viet Nam Individuals with ICT skills Information and data literacy 2024 ITU', 'Viet Nam Using basic arithmetic formula in a spreadsheet 2024 ITU', 'Viet Nam ICT skills datahub 2024'.
 5) Extract value, year, unit %, sub-indicator/activity name and URL. Do not aggregate until the research team approves the CAP01 formula.
 6) Bot rule: if DataHub returns multiple activity-level values, store them as raw activity fields first, then calculate the CAP01 composite in the data processing layer.
 7) Manual QA: verify that the denominator is individuals/labour force, not enterprises.
Frequency: Annual / irregular depending on ITU updates
Collection method: Web scrape / DataHub export / API if available; manual QA required
Update suitability: Medium-high for raw ITU activity values; medium for composite indicator because method must be fixed by the research team
Tier / decision: Tier 1 as national proxy; keep because it represents the foundation of CAP
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: 2024 ITU DataHub search results show raw activity-level values for Viet Nam such as verifying reliability of online information = 4.44%, using basic arithmetic formula in a spreadsheet = 17.5%, and using copy/paste tools within a document = 9.76%. Because CAP01 is a composite/proxy, the final 2024 CAP01 value is left blank until the formula is approved.
Notes: Do not use this as an enterprise-only TMĐT indicator. It is a national human-capital proxy. If the research wants enterprise-specific data, combine it with CAP02 and CAP03.

Primary VDEI pillar name: Digital Capability / Năng lực số của doanh nghiệp và người lao động
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo năng lực tổ chức, kỹ năng số, mức độ sẵn sàng triển khai kênh bán hàng số và vận hành TMĐT của doanh nghiệp.
Indicator meaning:
Đo mức độ doanh nghiệp đầu tư vào đào tạo nhân sự. 

Trong bối cảnh không có dữ liệu public hoàn hảo về đào tạo kỹ năng số/TMĐT định kỳ, chỉ số này dùng proxy từ tỷ lệ doanh nghiệp có chương trình đào tạo chính thức cho nhân viên và/hoặc số doanh nghiệp được đào tạo chuyển đổi số.
Unit: % of firms; or number of firms trained if using program-output data
Formula / operationalization: Option A (preferred proxy): firms offering formal training / total firms × 100. Option B (digital-specific support indicator): number of firms directly trained on digital transformation by AED/MPI program in the reference period.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Primary source: World Bank Enterprise Surveys, Viet Nam 2023 country profile and WDI indicator IC.FRM.TRNG.ZS. Supporting source: AED/MPI/GIZ Annual Enterprise Digital Transformation Report 2023, Figure 12/program results. No Questionnaire source used.
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) For formal-training proxy, open World Bank Enterprise Surveys country profile: https://www.enterprisesurveys.org/content/dam/enterprisesurveys/documents/country/Viet-Nam-2023.pdf.
 2) Search inside PDF using Ctrl+F: 'Percent of firms offering formal training' or 'formal training'.
 3) Extract Table of indicator variables near page 10: 'Percent of firms offering formal training' for Viet Nam 2023. Store value, year, unit, page and source URL.
 4) For metadata/API setup, open World Bank indicator page: https://data.worldbank.org/indicator/IC.FRM.TRNG.ZS?locations=VN and metadata page for IC.FRM.TRNG.ZS.
 5) For digital-training support data, open AED/MPI/GIZ report and search 'Hơn 13.000', 'đào tạo trực tiếp', 'video đào tạo', 'Chương trình hỗ trợ doanh nghiệp chuyển đổi số'.
 6) Extract program-output values only as a supporting field, not as the main percentage unless a denominator is available.
 7) Bot rule: if World Bank has no value for 2024/2025, leave those cells blank rather than forward-filling.
Frequency: Ad hoc for WBES; annual/program-period for AED/MPI/GIZ reports
Collection method: PDF table extraction + World Bank Data/API + manual QA
Update suitability: Medium. WBES is reliable but not annual and not digital-specific; AED/MPI/GIZ is digital-specific but often reports program outputs rather than rates
Tier / decision: Tier 1 proxy for CAP; use with clear caveat
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: World Bank Enterprise Surveys Viet Nam 2023 country profile, table of indicator variables: 'Percent of firms offering formal training' = 8.7. Same table reports 'Proportion of workers offered formal training' = 65.7 for manufacturing firms within firms offering training. AED/MPI/GIZ report also states that by Aug 2023 more than 13,000 enterprises in 63 provinces/cities were directly trained on digital transformation, but this is program output, not a rate.
Notes: This is the most defensible CAP training proxy. Label clearly as formal/digital-training proxy, not exact 'periodic digital-skills training in e-commerce enterprises'.

Primary VDEI pillar name: Digital Capability / Năng lực số của doanh nghiệp và người lao động
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo năng lực tổ chức, kỹ năng số, mức độ sẵn sàng triển khai kênh bán hàng số và vận hành TMĐT của doanh nghiệp.
Indicator: Enterprise digital transformation readiness score - People & Organization
Indicator meaning: Đo mức độ sẵn sàng của doanh nghiệp về con người, tổ chức và năng lực quản trị để triển khai chuyển đổi số/TMĐT
Unit: Score, usually 0-5 if using AED/MPI MĐSS CĐS framework
Formula / operationalization: Use the score of 'Con người và Tổ chức' under the MĐSS CĐS framework. If the team wants 0-100 normalization: normalized score = raw score / 5 × 100.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Primary source: Báo cáo thường niên Chuyển đổi số doanh nghiệp Việt Nam 2023 by AED/MPI/GIZ, Part 2, Figure 5. No Questionnaire source used.
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Open the AED/MPI/GIZ report PDF: https://blog.slimcrm.vn/sites/default/files/2024/04/ebooks/bao-cao-thuong-nien-cds_final.pdf.
 2) Search inside PDF using Ctrl+F: 'Mức độ sẵn sàng chuyển đổi số', 'Con người và tổ chức', 'Hình 5'.
 3) Go to Part 2, around page 25, Figure 5: 'Mức độ sẵn sàng chuyển đổi số trên 7 khía cạnh của các doanh nghiệp tại Việt Nam'.
 4) Extract the 2023 value for 'Con người và tổ chức' and the comparison year if present. Store raw score and scale.
 5) Check if a newer report exists on https://digital.business.gov.vn/ or the page 'Tài liệu báo cáo'. Search terms: 'Báo cáo thường niên chuyển đổi số doanh nghiệp Việt Nam 2024', 'Báo cáo thường niên chuyển đổi kép 2025'.
 6) Bot rule: do not infer leadership readiness from general text. Only extract values from labeled figure/table fields.
 7) Manual QA: verify that the figure uses a 0-5 maturity/readiness scale before normalization.
Frequency: Annual if AED/MPI/GIZ report is updated; otherwise irregular
Collection method: PDF chart/table extraction + manual QA; possible website crawl from digital.business.gov.vn report library
Update suitability: Medium. Good conceptual fit and published source, but update regularity for 2024/2025 must be checked
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: AED/MPI/GIZ Annual Enterprise Digital Transformation Report 2023, Figure 5, page 25: 'Con người và tổ chức' appears as 3.0 for 2023 and 2.9 for 2022. 2024/2025 public values were not confirmed during this extraction.
Notes: Use CAP03 instead of a purely subjective leadership-readiness indicator, unless a reliable leadership-specific dataset becomes available.

Primary VDEI pillar name: Digital Capability / Năng lực số của doanh nghiệp và người lao động
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo năng lực tổ chức, kỹ năng số, mức độ sẵn sàng triển khai kênh bán hàng số và vận hành TMĐT của doanh nghiệp.
Indicator: Readiness to adopt new digital technologies
Indicator meaning: Đo mức độ sẵn sàng của doanh nghiệp trong việc ứng dụng công nghệ mới vào hệ thống, dữ liệu và vận hành.
Unit: Score, usually 0-5 if using AED/MPI MĐSS CĐS framework
Formula / operationalization: Use the MĐSS CĐS (mức độ sẵn sàng CĐS)score for 'Hệ thống CNTT & Quản trị dữ liệu'. Optional extended version: average of 'Hệ thống CNTT & Quản trị dữ liệu' and 'Định hướng chiến lược'. If normalized: raw score / 5 × 100.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Primary source: Báo cáo thường niên Chuyển đổi số doanh nghiệp Việt Nam 2023 by AED/MPI/GIZ, Part 2, Figure 5. Supporting source: digital.business.gov.vn readiness self-assessment tool. No Questionnaire source used.
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) Open the AED/MPI/GIZ report PDF: https://blog.slimcrm.vn/sites/default/files/2024/04/ebooks/bao-cao-thuong-nien-cds_final.pdf 
 2) Search Ctrl+F keywords: 'Hệ thống CNTT', 'quản trị dữ liệu', 'Định hướng chiến lược', 'Hình 5'.
 3) Go to page 25, Figure 5. Extract the 2023 score for 'Hệ thống CNTT & quản trị dữ liệu'.
 4) If the research team approves an extended score, also extract 'Định hướng chiến lược' and calculate average in the data-processing layer; do not mix definitions across years.
 5) Check digital.business.gov.vn for newer reports/tools: search site for 'Mức độ sẵn sàng chuyển đổi số', 'báo cáo', 'công cụ đánh giá'.
 6) Suggested web search keywords: 'Báo cáo thường niên chuyển đổi số doanh nghiệp 2023 Hệ thống CNTT quản trị dữ liệu 2.9', 'MĐSS CĐS Hệ thống CNTT quản trị dữ liệu doanh nghiệp Việt Nam 2023'.
 7) Manual QA: confirm figure labels and year legend; ignore values from screenshots without source page.
Frequency: Annual if report is updated; otherwise irregular
Collection method: PDF chart extraction + website report-library monitoring
Update suitability: Medium. Strong fit for readiness but depends on availability of updated AED/MPI report
Tier / decision: Tier 1 or Tier 2 depending on whether 2024/2025 reports become available
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: AED/MPI/GIZ Annual Enterprise Digital Transformation Report 2023, Figure 5, page 25: 'Hệ thống CNTT & quản trị dữ liệu' appears as 2.9 for 2023 and 2.6 for 2022. The same figure reports 'Định hướng chiến lược' = 3.3 in 2023. 2024/2025 values were not confirmed.
Notes: Keep definition stable: either single aspect 'Hệ thống CNTT & quản trị dữ liệu' or an approved composite. Do not switch definitions later.

Primary VDEI pillar name: Digital Capability / Năng lực số của doanh nghiệp và người lao động
Primary VDEI pillar meaning: Đo năng lực tổ chức, kỹ năng số, mức độ sẵn sàng triển khai kênh bán hàng số và vận hành TMĐT của doanh nghiệp.
Indicator meaning:
Đo năng lực sẵn sàng của doanh nghiệp về quản lý rủi ro và an ninh mạng trong bối cảnh vận hành TMĐT. 


Nếu muốn đo đúng 'mức đào tạo an ninh mạng', cần dữ liệu từ NCSC/MIC/VNISA hoặc dữ liệu nội bộ/đối tác; dữ liệu public hiện phù hợp nhất là proxy readiness.
Unit: Score 0-5 if using AED/MPI MĐSS CĐS; or % firms/employees trained if direct training data is later found
Formula / operationalization: Preferred public proxy: MĐSS CĐS score for 'Quản lý rủi ro & An ninh mạng'. If direct training dataset exists: number of firms/employees receiving cybersecurity training / total firms/employees × 100.
Cleaned source detail (no Questionnaire): Primary source: AED/MPI/GIZ Annual Enterprise Digital Transformation Report 2023, Figure 5. Supporting monitoring sources: NCSC/MIC, VNISA reports/events, Viettel Cyber Security reports for cyber risk context. No Questionnaire source used.
Detailed data access / crawl instruction:
1) For public proxy, open AED/MPI/GIZ report PDF and search: 'Quản lý rủi ro', 'An ninh mạng', 'Hình 5'.
 2) Go to page 25, Figure 5 and extract 2023 score for 'Quản lý rủi ro & An ninh mạng'.
 3) For direct training data, crawl/check NCSC: https://ncsc.gov.vn/ using keywords 'đào tạo an toàn thông tin doanh nghiệp', 'diễn tập an toàn thông tin', 'nâng cao nhận thức an toàn thông tin', 'doanh nghiệp'.
 4) Check VNISA reports/news: https://vnisa.org.vn/ with keywords 'đào tạo', 'an toàn thông tin', 'doanh nghiệp', '2023', '2024', '2025'.
 5) Check Viettel Cyber Security or other reputable cybersecurity reports for contextual indicators, but do not use attack counts as training level.
 6) Bot rule: if source only reports number of cyberattacks or incidents, store under risk-context metadata, not CAP05 value.
 7) If direct training numerator and denominator are not available, use AED readiness score as CAP05 and mark it as proxy.
Frequency: Annual/irregular depending on AED report and cybersecurity organizations
Collection method: PDF chart extraction + website/news crawl + manual QA; partner data may be required for direct training rate
Update suitability: Medium-low for direct training; medium for AED readiness proxy
Tier / decision: Tier 2 proxy. Useful for CAP but must be clearly labeled as readiness proxy unless training-rate data is found
Data evidence / notes for 2023-2025: AED/MPI/GIZ Annual Enterprise Digital Transformation Report 2023, Figure 5, page 25: 'Quản lý rủi ro & An ninh mạng' appears as 3.0 for 2023 and 2.4 for 2022. No public nationwide enterprise cybersecurity-training rate for 2023-2025 was confirmed.
Notes: If your lecturer insists on 'training' rather than 'readiness', keep 2023-2025 data blank and mark direct data-sharing required.
